    All functions

    adm_pointRadius()

    Find coordinates and uncertainty for adminsitrative areas

    rbind data.frames that do not necessarily have the same column names

    carobiner-package carobiner

    Standardizing agricultural research data

    Change the variable names of a data.frame

    check_terms()

    Check the terms uses in a dataset

    dfput()

    Print a data.frame as copy-pasteable R code

    Generate a draft Carob script

    Change months in English to a month number.

    geocode()

    Find coordinates for geographic locations

    geocode_duplicates()

    Find coordinates for duplicated geographic locations

    Download a data set

    get_function()

    Get a function

    get_locations()

    Get the compiled location data

    get_metadata()

    Get the dataset level meta-data
